description: Searches directory users (Graph GET /users). First page: pass query (substring match). Later pages: pass odata_next_link copied from @odata.nextLink in the previous response (query is then ignored).

query.description: Substring for the first page only (displayName, mail, userPrincipalName). Not used when odata_next_link is set.

odata_next_link.description: Pagination: exact @odata.nextLink string from the prior teams_search_users response.

top.description: First-page $top (default 25). Ignored when odata_next_link is set.
